decision: Current system is WC12 OS + Stage23 PC/GitHub kit + GitHub governance state; WC13 does not yet exist as one integrated bootable bundle.
allowed_claims: WC12 bootable OS and Stage23 PC kit are distributed to PC and GitHub Release.
GitHub Release assets were downloaded back and SHA-256 verified in Stage 25.
Positive PR path under CI-required ruleset was tested and evidence-locked.
PowerShell Cyan clipboard paste-back UX is locked as operator workflow.
disallowed_claims: A single integrated WC13 bootable OS bundle exists.
Force-push/delete behavior has been adversarially tested.
